---
title: "Review of Isolate or Engage - Croatian International Relations Review"
date: 2018-04
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [public diplomacy, people-to-people diplomacy, foreign policy, international relations, diplomacy, 2018]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan*</strong> (2018), "Review of the book [Wiseman, G. (2015). Isolate or Engage: Adversarial States, U.S. Foreign Policy, and Public Diplomacy. Stanford University Press]," <em>Croatian International Relations Review</em>: 24(81): 146-149, <a href="https://hrcak.srce.hr/file/294507"><code>link</code></a>
#draft: true
---


## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@article{ayhan_book_2018,
	title = {[{Book} {Review} for {Review} of the book [{Wiseman}, {G}. (2015). {Isolate} or {Engage}: {Adversarial} {States}, {U}.{S}. {Foreign} {Policy}, and {Public} {Diplomacy}. {Stanford} {University} {Press}].},
	volume = {24},
	number = {81},
	journal = {Croatian International Relations Review},
	author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
	year = {2018},
	note = {Type: Book review},
	pages = {146--149},
}
```
